body:
## Summary

- Adds `.mcp.json` to `.gitignore` to prevent accidental commits of the TestSprite API key
- `.mcp.json` (gitignored) configures the TestSprite MCP server: `npx @testsprite/testsprite-mcp@latest`

## Notes

The `.mcp.json` file is local-only and must be created manually on each machine with a valid `API_KEY`.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RGUZRCtJSGcCnrHimLNrwA

---
